function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"goal": "Add a /goodbye endpoint to the Go HTTP service that returns a JSON goodbye message, with corresponding unit tests using net/http/httptest.", "context": "The project is a Go HTTP service (main.go) with a single / endpoint serving plain text. Add a parallel /goodbye route that returns JSON {\"message\": \"Goodbye, World!\"} with HTTP 200 and Content-Type application/json. SOPs require all endpoints to have tests and return JSON responses where applicable.", "scope": {"include": ["main.go", "main_test.go"], "exclude": [".git", ".semspec", "vendor"], "do_not_touch": ["go.mod", "README.md"]}}
